query: a heist movie with a twist ending

rankings.title: Hero Wanted
rankings.justification: The protagonist orchestrates an elaborate bank heist to play the hero, but the plan goes horribly wrong when the robbery turns violent and results in unexpected bloodshed.

rankings.title: Redirected
rankings.justification: A casino heist in London goes awry due to betrayal and global events, leaving the perpetrators stranded in an unfamiliar country where they must navigate a surreal series of violent misunderstandings.

rankings.title: Rajathandhiram
rankings.justification: After jobless youth attempt a high-stakes heist, they find themselves caught in a dangerous web of double-crosses by shady characters forcing them into a much larger operation.

rankings.title: Villain
rankings.justification: While planning an ambitious raid on a plastics factory, an East End gangster must deal with complex internal dynamics and violent complications that deviate from his standard criminal methodology.

rankings.title: The Last Shot
rankings.justification: An FBI agent stages a fake film production as an elaborate sting operation to entrap mobsters, only to find the line between reality and the heist-like deception blurring as he becomes obsessed with the movie business.

rankings.title: Desperate
rankings.justification: A trucker is inadvertently pulled into a burglary-turned-murder, forcing him into a desperate cat-and-mouse game where he must outmaneuver both the police and the criminal gang holding his wife hostage.

rankings.title: Stolen Heaven
rankings.justification: A street girl and a young thief execute a robbery for twenty thousand dollars, but the weight of their crime leads to an unexpected moral pivot where the man confesses and turns himself in.

rankings.title: Maaro
rankings.justification: A bank robbery leads to a tragic death and a suicide, setting in motion a suspenseful investigation where the protagonist seeks to expose the true culprit behind the criminal conspiracy.

rankings.title: Farewell
rankings.justification: A millionaire's wife and a steward orchestrate a cold-blooded murder plot to steal his fortune, resulting in a dark sequence of betrayal, imprisonment, and violent consequences.

rankings.title: Guest House
rankings.justification: A lustful guest is murdered for a valuable ring, but the perpetrator faces an unforeseen twist when the victim's severed hand gains supernatural power to seek vengeance.

query: an epic adventure movie with a sad ending

rankings.title: The Disappeared
rankings.justification: This epic struggle for survival in the vast North Atlantic follows six men whose isolation and deteriorating mental states reflect the grim reality of their stranded situation.

rankings.title: Halunda Tavaru
rankings.justification: This tragedy drama details the harsh riches-to-rags transition of its protagonists, culminating in a sad ending where both lead characters die.

rankings.title: Anumati
rankings.justification: The story depicts the emotional and financial struggle of an old man trying to save his wife, ending in his tragic death despite the help of a friend.

rankings.title: Tony de Peltrie
rankings.justification: This short film captures the melancholy journey of a piano player reminiscing over his past glory days, ending on a deeply sad, fading note.

rankings.title: Bangarada Jinke
rankings.justification: This film features an epic-scale adventure involving a treasure hunt for a golden deer, set against a backdrop of rebirth and revenge.

rankings.title: Visitors
rankings.justification: The protagonist's solo voyage around the world turns into a psychological adventure as she grapples with increasing isolation and madness on the open sea.

rankings.title: This Is the End
rankings.justification: The film depicts a chaotic, apocalyptic struggle as friends face the biblical end of the world, losing several companions to death along the way.

rankings.title: Nightmare at Bittercreek
rankings.justification: This suspenseful adventure follows a group of women hiking through the wilderness who are forced into a deadly struggle for survival against racist survivalists.

rankings.title: Aakashathinum Bhoomikkumidayil
rankings.justification: The narrative explores the tragic aftermath of a case of mistaken identity, where political murder leaves two families devastated.

rankings.title: A Tale of Sorrow and Sadness
rankings.justification: This story tracks a model's sudden rise to success on the professional circuit followed by a dark and sinister descent into blackmail and threats.
